mapper.sql: id, task_id, task_name, tran_id, begin_time, end_time, status, success, excute_time, condition, remark
mapper.select:
select * from VzDataQuality.dbo.tb_collectionlog where 1 = 1
and (end_time between CONCAT(#{beginTime},' 00:00:00') and CONCAT(#{endTime},' 23:59:59'))
and task_name like CONCAT('%',#{taskName},'%')
and success =#{logType}
order by ${orderByField} ASC
order by ${orderByField} DESC
order by id DESC

select count(1) from VzDataQuality.dbo.tb_collectionlog m1 left join VzDataQuality.dbo.r_transformation m2 on m1.tran_id=m2.ID_TRANSFORMATION left join VzDataQuality.dbo.tb_collectiontimingdata m3 on m1.task_id=m3.id left join VzDataQuality.dbo.ThridParty m4 on m3.company_id=m4.SysId left join VzDataQuality.dbo.Event m5 on m3.monitoring_events=m5.EventId left join VzDataQuality.dbo.Event m6 on m3.broadcast_events=m6.EventId left join VzDataQuality.dbo.Event m7 on m3.sending_broadcast_events=m7.EventId

select m1.id,m1.task_id,m1.tran_id,m1.begin_time,m1.end_time,m1.status,m1.success,m1.excute_time, m1.condition,m1.remark,m2.Name tran_name,m3.time_stamp,m3.cron,m3.work_untis_name,m3.work_untis_code, m3.monitoring_events,m3.broadcast_events,m3.sending_broadcast_events,m4.ThirdPartyName third_party_name, m5.EventCN monitoring_events_name,m6.EventCN broadcast_events_name,m7.EventCN sending_broadcast_events_name from VzDataQuality.dbo.tb_collectionlog m1 left join VzDataQuality.dbo.r_transformation m2 on m1.tran_id=m2.ID_TRANSFORMATION left join VzDataQuality.dbo.tb_collectiontimingdata m3 on m1.task_id=m3.id left join VzDataQuality.dbo.ThridParty m4 on m3.company_id=m4.SysId left join VzDataQuality.dbo.Event m5 on m3.monitoring_events=m5.EventId left join VzDataQuality.dbo.Event m6 on m3.broadcast_events=m6.EventId left join VzDataQuality.dbo.Event m7 on m3.sending_broadcast_events=m7.EventId
order by m1.end_time offset #{offset} rows fetch next #{limit} rows only

select m1.id,m1.task_id,m1.tran_id,m1.begin_time,m1.end_time,m1.status,m1.success,m1.excute_time, case when m1.condition is null then '成功无异常信息' else m1.condition end condition, m1.remark,m2.Name tran_name,m3.time_stamp,m3.cron,m3.work_untis_name,m3.work_untis_code, m3.monitoring_events,m3.broadcast_events,m3.sending_broadcast_events,m4.ThirdPartyName third_party_name, m5.EventCN monitoring_events_name,m6.EventCN broadcast_events_name,m7.EventCN sending_broadcast_events_name from VzDataQuality.dbo.tb_collectionlog m1 left join VzDataQuality.dbo.r_transformation m2 on m1.tran_id=m2.ID_TRANSFORMATION left join VzDataQuality.dbo.tb_collectiontimingdata m3 on m1.task_id=m3.id left join VzDataQuality.dbo.ThridParty m4 on m3.company_id=m4.SysId left join VzDataQuality.dbo.Event m5 on m3.monitoring_events=m5.EventId left join VzDataQuality.dbo.Event m6 on m3.broadcast_events=m6.EventId left join VzDataQuality.dbo.Event m7 on m3.sending_broadcast_events=m7.EventId where m1.id=#{keyId}
